summary: Bug fix verification complete: TeamViewer Account Data storage and display is working correctly. Backend fix in device_agent.py (lines 147-155) stores account_assigned, account_email, account_company fields. Frontend correctly displays 'Konto-Status' with 'Verknüpft'/'Nicht verknüpft' status.
seed_data_creation: Created test devices with TeamViewer account data (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeamViewer Account data fix is verified. Navigation: Admin Portal -> Agent tab -> Click device card -> TeamViewer section shows 'Konto-Status' field with account status.

Backend_Register_Device_With_Account_Ass.description: POST /api/device-agent/register correctly stores teamviewer.account_assigned=true, account_email, account_company

Backend_Update_Device_Account_Data.description: Re-registering device updates TeamViewer account data correctly

Backend_Devices_List_Includes_Account_Da.description: GET /api/device-agent/devices returns TeamViewer account data in device list

Backend_Backward_Compatibility.description: Device registration without TeamViewer account fields still works

Frontend_Konto_Status_Display.description: Device Details Modal shows 'Konto-Status' label in TeamViewer section
Frontend_Konto_Status_Display.evidence: Screenshot shows 'KONTO-STATUS' label with 'Nicht verknüpft' value in red

Frontend_Problem_Detection.description: When account_assigned=false, 'Probleme erkannt' section shows 'TeamViewer nicht mit Konto verknüpft'
Frontend_Problem_Detection.evidence: Screenshot shows warning in Problems section

Frontend_Account_Name_And_Firma_Fields.description: Code correctly shows Account Name and Firma fields when account_email and account_company have values

navigation_path.step4: Click on any device card (e.g., CGNE01-01)
navigation_path.step5: View TeamViewer section - 'Konto-Status' field is displayed
navigation_path.result: Shows 'Verknüpft' (green) or 'Nicht verknüpft' (red) based on account_assigned value

bug_fix_details.original_issue: Dashboard shows 'TeamViewer nicht mit Konto verknüpft' even when PowerShell script collects account data correctly
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Backend was not storing TeamViewer account fields in the database
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: device_agent.py lines 147-155 now correctly maps teamviewer_account_assigned, teamviewer_account_email, teamviewer_account_company to teamviewer.account_assigned, teamviewer.account_email, teamviewer.account_company
bug_fix_details.verification: All 5 backend tests pass, frontend displays correct status
